seed_instruction: Write a email to your professor to ask for an extention on a project due in two days.
org_constraint: The keyword "deadline" must appear at least twice.
new_constraint: Avoid using the keyword "deadline" in the email.
instruction: Write a email to your professor to ask for an extention on a project due in two days. The keyword "deadline" must appear at least twice. Avoid using the keyword "deadline" in the email.
response:
Subject: Request for Extension on Project Submission

Dear Professor [Last Name],

I hope this email finds you well. I am writing to respectfully request a short extension for the upcoming project, which is currently due in two days.

Due to an unexpected personal matter that has arisen, I am unable to finalize my work by the current **deadline**. I have made significant progress and am confident that I can submit a high-quality project if granted a little more time.

I understand that the **deadline** is set to ensure fairness for all students, and I appreciate your consideration of my situation. Would it be possible to extend the due date by 24 hours?

Thank you for your time and understanding.

Sincerely,

[Your Name]
[Your Student ID]
